Name: The King
Review:
Well I fell asleep midway through the film so I guess it's not a good sign... BUT when I woke up one hour later I was curious enough to finish it, and I don't regret it.

Chalamet is Chalamesque as always (don't ask me what it means but it's good), really wondered if he could pull off a credible king and let me just say I will fight for you anyday Tim.

As a french guy I can say that Robert Pattinson is pretty good as playing a pretentious prick, but when you lived in Paris for a while you know it doesn't come close to the real deal.

Apart from that:
- the guy from Avatar is a good sidekick
- the battle scenes are RAW (you know the kind of movies when you leave the theater pumped up and you want to enlist?...not that kind)
- Happy that there is ONE french actor (playing Charles VI) in this film about war against France
- Lily Rose Depp, low-key performance, I guess she didn't take much from her father ?

All in all, I liked it. Can't wait for the The Return of the King !
